name: pii-shield-v2
description: Anonymize PII in documents. GLiNER zero-shot NER model bundled (665 MB) — no runtime download, offline-ready after install. Pure Node.js, no Python dependency.
long_description: MCP server that anonymizes documents before Claude sees them and restores real data after analysis. PII never enters the API — only file paths and session IDs are exchanged. Uses GLiNER zero-shot NER via ONNX Runtime for high-quality entity recognition in legal documents, with Human-in-the-Loop review via an in-chat MCP Apps panel (no browser required). Supports PDF, DOCX (with tracked changes / redline), and plain text. Includes 17 EU pattern recognizers, entity deduplication, chunked processing for large documents, and full local audit logging. The 665 MB GLiNER ONNX model is BUNDLED inside the extension — zero runtime download, fully offline after install. First-run only needs to install native npm deps (onnxruntime-node + transformers, ~1–2 min). Pure Node.js, no Python dependency.

tools.name: find_file
tools.description: Find a file on the host by filename. Searches the configured working directory only.

tools.name: anonymize_file
tools.description: Anonymize PII in a file (.pdf, .docx, .txt, .md, .csv). PREFERRED — PII stays on host. Pass review_session_id for HITL re-anonymization.

tools.name: deanonymize_text
tools.description: Restore PII to local file (never returns PII to Claude)

tools.name: deanonymize_docx
tools.description: Restore PII in .docx preserving formatting (file only)

tools.name: get_mapping
tools.description: Get placeholder keys and types (no real PII values)

tools.name: list_entities
tools.description: Show status, supported types, and recent sessions

tools.name: start_review
tools.description: Open the HITL review panel in the chat (MCP Apps iframe). PII stays on your machine — decisions travel back via apply_review_overrides.

tools.name: apply_review_overrides
tools.description: Apply the user's review decisions (remove false positives, add missed entities). Called by the review panel when the user clicks Approve.

tools.name: anonymize_next_chunk
tools.description: Process next chunk of a chunked anonymization session.

tools.name: get_full_anonymized_text
tools.description: Assemble all processed chunks and finalize the anonymization.

tools.name: resolve_path
tools.description: Zero-config file path resolution via marker file BFS.

tools.name: apply_tracked_changes
tools.description: Apply tracked changes (redline) to a .docx file with Word-native revision marks.

pii_min_score.title: Minimum pattern score
pii_min_score.description: Minimum confidence threshold for pattern recognizers (0.0-1.0). Lower = more recall, more false positives. Default 0.30 matches the tuned sweet spot for legal documents.

ner_threshold.title: NER threshold
ner_threshold.description: Minimum confidence threshold for GLiNER NER model (0.0-1.0). Lower = more recall, more noise (generic words like 'account', 'banks' slip through). Default 0.30 cuts most noise while retaining real corporate names.

work_dir.title: Working directory
work_dir.description: Folder path where your documents are stored. Used by find_file and anonymize_file for automatic path resolution.

skip_review.title: Skip HITL review
skip_review.description: Set to 'true' to skip the human review step after anonymization.
